channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [OASISEC] Oasis Securities to raise ₹30 Cr via Rights Issue; Appoints new CFO
item.description:
Oasis Securities Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 10, 2026, approved raising funds up to ₹30.00 crores through a rights issue of equity shares. The detailed terms, including issue price, rights entitlement ratio, and record date, will be determined and disclosed later by a newly constituted Rights Issue Committee. Concurrently, the Board appointed Mr. Surendra Kumar Joshi as the new Chief Financial Officer, effective April 10, 2026. This appointment follows the cessation of Mr. Devi Dutt Agarwal from the CFO position on March 23, 2026. The equity shares for the rights issue will have a face value of Re. 1.00/-.

  • Board approved raising up to ₹30 crore via rights issue.
  • Mr. Surendra Kumar Joshi appointed as new CFO effective April 10, 2026.
  • Details of rights issue (price, ratio, record date) to be decided later.
  • Previous CFO, Mr. Devi Dutt Agarwal, ceased duties on March 23, 2026.
  • Rights issue shares will have a face value of Re. 1.00/-.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OASIS SECURITIES LTD. | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [THOMASCOOK] Deepti Sheth elevated as President & Group Head - HR at Thomas Cook
item.description:
Thomas Cook (India) Limited has announced the elevation of Deepti Sheth to President & Group Head – Human Resources, effective April 10, 2026. This move underscores the company's commitment to strengthening its leadership and people strategy across the Group. In her new role, Ms. Sheth will be responsible for leading the Group HR function, focusing on talent management, leadership development, employee experience, diversity, inclusion, and digital transformation. With over two decades of experience and a decade-long tenure within the Group, including her recent role as Senior Vice President & Head – HR at SOTC Travel Ltd, she brings extensive expertise in aligning HR practices with business priorities and building high-performance teams. Her elevation also highlights Thomas Cook's dedication to fostering an inclusive workplace, as evidenced by its recognition as the "Best Organisation for Women."

  • Deepti Sheth elevated to President & Group Head – HR for Thomas Cook Group.
  • Reinforces focus on leadership, talent development, and people strategy.
  • She brings over two decades of HR expertise to the new role.
  • Aims to build dynamic, future-ready teams and enhance employee experience.
  • Highlights company's commitment to diversity and inclusion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THOMAS COOK (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CUB] City Union Bank Opens New Branch in Chennai, Total 950
item.description:
🔥 Trending

City Union Bank announced the opening of a new branch on April 10, 2026, located in West Mambalam, Chennai. This expansion brings the bank's total branch network to 950. The intimation was made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015, highlighting the bank's continued efforts to expand its physical presence and reach more customers. This strategic move aims to strengthen its footprint in key urban areas.

  • New branch opened in West Mambalam, Chennai.
  • Bank's total branch count now stands at 950.
  • Expansion enhances physical presence and customer reach.
  • Strategic move to strengthen footprint in urban areas.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CITY UNION BANK LTD. | Category: Expansion

item.title: [MEGRISOFT] Megri Soft clarifies share price movement is market-driven
item.description:
Megri Soft Ltd received an email from the stock exchange seeking clarification on significant movement in its equity share price. The company responded by stating that there is no undisclosed information or announcement required under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, that could explain the price fluctuation. Megri Soft attributed the share price movement to being purely market-driven and owing to market conditions, over which the company has no control or knowledge. The management also confirmed that it is not connected with the movement in the share price and assures continued adherence to disseminating all unpublished price-sensitive information.

  • BSE sought clarification on Megri Soft's significant share price movement.
  • Company states no undisclosed information under SEBI Regulation 30.
  • Share price movement is purely market-driven, beyond company control.
  • Management denies any connection to the share price fluctuations.
  • Megri Soft assures regular disclosure of price-sensitive information.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Megri Soft Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [SHTL] Shining Tools clarifies no undisclosed info after price movement
item.description:
Shining Tools Ltd responded to the exchange regarding significant share price movement. The company confirmed its adherence to SEBI Regulation 30, stating all price-sensitive information has been promptly disclosed. It further clarified that there is no pending undisclosed information that could impact the scrip's price. The company attributed the recent share price fluctuations to market-driven factors and investor sentiment, explicitly stating management is not connected to these movements.

  • Company confirms compliance with SEBI Regulation 30.
  • No undisclosed price-sensitive information is pending.
  • Share price movement is attributed to market forces.
  • Management denies connection to share price fluctuations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shining Tools Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [PAISALO] Paisalo Digital allots 100 CPs worth ₹5 Cr via private placement
item.description:
Paisalo Digital Ltd's Operations and Finance Committee, on April 10, 2026, approved the allotment of 100 listed Commercial Papers (CPs) through a private placement. Each CP has a face value of ₹5,00,000 and was issued at ₹4,79,544. The total redemption value for these CPs is ₹5,00,00,000. These CPs have a tenure of 173 days from the allotment date, maturing on September 30, 2026. Bank of Maharashtra is the Issuing and Paying Agent (IPA) for this issuance, which represents a debt financing activity for the company.

  • Paisalo Digital allotted 100 listed Commercial Papers via private placement.
  • Total redemption value of the CPs is ₹5,00,00,000.
  • Each CP has a face value of ₹5,00,000, issued at ₹4,79,544.
  • The CPs have a 173-day tenure, maturing on September 30, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paisalo Digital Ltd | Category: Loan & Debt

item.title: [OASISEC] Oasis Securities to raise ₹30 Cr via rights issue; appoints new CFO
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Oasis Securities Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 10, 2026, approved raising funds up to ₹30.00 crores through a rights issue of equity shares. The issuance will be made to eligible equity shareholders, with specific terms like issue price, ratio, and record date to be determined and disclosed later by a newly constituted Rights Issue Committee. Additionally, the Board approved the appointment of Mr. Surendra Kumar Joshi as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) effective April 10, 2026, following the cessation of Mr. Devi Dutt Agarwal from the post on March 23, 2026.

  • Board approved raising up to ₹30 crore via a rights issue of equity shares.
  • Funds will be issued to eligible equity shareholders on a rights basis.
  • A Rights Issue Committee is formed to finalize issue details like price and ratio.
  • Mr. Surendra Kumar Joshi has been appointed as the new Chief Financial Officer.
  • The previous CFO, Mr. Devi Dutt Agarwal, ceased to hold the position.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OASIS SECURITIES LTD. | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [COALINDIA] CIL insulates users from rising input costs despite operational cost surge
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Coal India Limited (CIL) is absorbing significant increases in operational costs to shield Indian coal users from escalating input prices. Despite a 44% surge in Ammonium Nitrate (AN) prices, a key component of explosives, leading to a 26% rise in explosive costs from ₹39,588 to ₹49,783 per metric ton, CIL is bearing the burden. Additionally, industrial diesel prices have jumped 54% from ₹92 to ₹142 per litre, with CIL also compensating contractors for this increase. Annually, CIL's subsidiaries consume around 9 lakh metric tons of explosives and 4.19 lakh kilolitres of diesel. To further support affordability, some CIL subsidiaries have reduced coal reserve prices in e-auctions and increased auction frequency and volume. This strategy aims to provide affordable dry fuel and prevent a cascading effect of price increases on the economy.

  • CIL absorbs significant input cost increases to insulate coal users.
  • Explosives cost rose 26% (₹39,588 to ₹49,783/MT) due to AN price surge.
  • Industrial diesel prices jumped 54% (₹92 to ₹142/litre).
  • CIL compensates contractors for increased diesel expenses.
  • Company aims to supply affordable coal, impacting potential revenue.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: COAL INDIA LTD. | Category: Press Release

item.title: [ENKEIWHEL] Enkei Wheels Appoints Dinesh Sarnaik as New CFO
item.description:
Enkei Wheels (India) Ltd has announced the appointment of Mr. Dinesh Sarnaik as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel. The appointment, effective from April 11, 2026, was made by the Board of Directors based on the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. Mr. Sarnaik, a Chartered Accountant, brings 18 years of experience in finance, taxation, treasury, and compliance management, having worked with multinational and listed organizations. He succeeds Mr. Kunal Sudhir Dhoke, who resigned on January 13, 2026. The company has made this disclosure in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Dinesh Sarnaik appointed as the new CFO of Enkei Wheels.
  • Appointment is effective from April 11, 2026.
  • He replaces Mr. Kunal Sudhir Dhoke, who resigned earlier.
  • Mr. Sarnaik is a CA with 18 years of finance experience.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ENKEI WHEELS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [FORTIS] Fortis Healthcare Debentures: CRISIL Upgrades Rating to AA+, Interest Paid
item.description:
Fortis Healthcare Ltd submitted its Annexure-XIV-B disclosure for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, complying with SEBI regulations for corporate bonds/debentures. The filing details the listing of three debenture issues on BSE, totaling ₹1550 Crore, all allotted and listed on December 19, 2024. A significant update includes CRISIL upgrading the credit rating for all three debenture series from 'CRISIL AA Stable' to 'CRISIL AA+ Stable' on September 1, 2025, with a stable outlook. The company also confirmed that all interest payments due on December 22, 2025, for these debentures were made on the actual due date, reporting no defaults or delays.

  • Fortis Healthcare submitted debenture disclosure for FY26.
  • CRISIL upgraded debenture credit rating to 'CRISIL AA+ Stable'.
  • Three debenture issues totaling ₹1550 Crore were listed on BSE.
  • All interest payments due on December 22, 2025, were made on time.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FORTIS HEALTHCARE LTD. | Category: Rating
